council_verdict: Ship what you have. Then build multi-version generation as AI-native moat. Editing is a trap.
key_findings: R1: Ship pricing + deploy to beta THIS WEEK (100% confidence)
R2: Multi-version batch generation with 4-variant comparison grid (95% confidence)
R3: Deploy + measure before building more features (96% confidence)
Y1: Watermark-gating as primary conversion lever
Y2: Smart social export with platform-specific formatting
Y3: Team collaboration with shareable draft links
Y4: Brand Kit — saved colors, fonts, logo
Y5: QR Code + Embed Code exports
Y6: Smart Regenerate with parameter pinning
council_debate: Editing — Designer+Customer want lightweight annotations; Strategist+Contrarian say skip it, restyle IS editing. Verdict: defer to Week 7+, A/B test first.
recommended_sequence: Week 2: Watermark + social export + success sound
Week 5: Smart Regenerate + QR/embed + session history
Week 7+: Brand Kit + public gallery (if data supports)
